_comment: Shared DEDUP-KEY parity vectors (T21 2026-06-03). The server TS `dedupKey` (backend/src/dedup-key.ts, dedup-key.test.ts) AND the macOS client `localDedupKey` (clients/macos/lib/capture_repository.dart, local_dedup_key_test.dart) BOTH assert against these, so the two hand-ported deterministic normalizers can't silently drift the offline dedup key from the server one. Cases are NFC-STABLE on purpose: NFC is the ONE step the client omits (Dart has no native NFC; the server applies it + re-keys authoritatively on sync), so a combining-mark case would legitimately differ between the ports and does NOT belong here. Each case: dedupKey(in) === out. NOT a lemmatizer — `saw`/`studied` stay distinct from `see`/`study`.
